ordered_steps.name: Inspect accessibility, type, size, and risk boundary
Copy or bind source into immutable local snapshot
Assign authority role and conflict policy
Record exclusions and derivative redactions separately

state_model.meaning: source item exists in intake register but has not been accepted
source bytes or canonical content are locally hash-bound
source may be consumed by downstream semantic modules
source is preserved but cannot be adopted without human decision
source cannot act as semantic authority in this run

forbidden_behaviors: mutate frozen source bytes in place
treat external link metadata as source content without local snapshot
adopt semantic claims from images before extraction evidence exists
invent product requirements during source intake
discard rejected or redacted source influence without a reason record
